case_title: ANDRE DYAS VS. UNITED AIRLINES INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-24-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYAS, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-24-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-23-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-01-2016

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-06-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ANDRE DYAS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DYAS, ANDRE
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYAS, ANDRE HEARING SET FOR APR-06-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF ANDRE DYAS IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
